Class RegistrableUser.Builder<T extends RegistrableUser.Builder<T>>

java.lang.Object
main.models.User.Builder<T>
main.models.RegistrableUser.Builder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the concrete builder subtype, for fluent method chaining
Direct Known Subclasses:
Client.Builder, Employee.Builder
Enclosing class:
RegistrableUser
public abstract static class RegistrableUser.Builder<T extends RegistrableUser.Builder<T>> extends User.Builder<T>
Base builder for RegistrableUser subclasses, adding the registrable-specific fields (NIF, phone, address) on top of User.Builder.
